agent_sql: SELECT s.Fname FROM student AS s WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM has_pet AS hp1 JOIN pets AS p1 ON hp1.PetID = p1.PetID WHERE hp1.StuID = s.StuID AND p1.PetType = '[REDACTED_LITERAL]') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM has_pet AS hp2 JOIN pets AS p2 ON hp2.PetID = p2.PetID WHERE hp2.StuID = s.StuID AND p2.PetType = '[REDACTED_LITERAL]') LIMIT 100
